name: Onion Lover's Twist
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Finely chopped onion (or 1/4 cup instant minced onions)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, dissolve yeast in warm water.
4. Add flour, sugar, salt, hot water, milk, butter, and egg to the yeast mixture.
5. Mix on low speed until moistened.
6. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed.
7. Stir in remaining ingredients by hand to form a soft dough.
8. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 45-60 minutes.
9. Prepare filling: Melt butter in a saucepan and add the remaining filling ingredients.
10. When the dough has risen, turn it out onto a floured board.
11. Knead until no longer sticky.
12. Roll into an 18x12-inch rectangle.
13. Spread with filling and cut lengthwise into three 18x4-inch strips.
14. Starting with the 18-inch side, roll each strip into a tight log.
15. Seal edges and ends of rolls.
16. On prepared cookie sheet, braid the three logs together.
17. Cover and let rise until doubled in size, about 45-60 minutes.
18. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown.
19. Serve warm or cool.
